sqlMap.select: SELECT REGDATE, B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT, 2) ELSE 0 END AS DTIME FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7) AS REGDATE, FORMID, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) AS DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7), FORMID, TENANT_ID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND DTIME != 0 AND B.FORMID = #searchID# ORDER BY B.FORMID, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), DEPTID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.DEPTID = #searchID# AND DTIME != '0' AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A.CN, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , USERID , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), USERID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.USERID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.USERID = #searchID# AND B.DTIME != 0 AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A.CN, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) AS DRAFTCNT, IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) AS DRAFTINGCNT, IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) AS DRAFTENDCNT, IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) AS RETURNCNT FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7) AS REGDATE, FORMID, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) AS DRAFTCNT, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) AS DRAFTINGCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(RETURNCNT) AS RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE,0,7), FORMID, TENANT_ID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND B.FORMID = #searchID# AND (DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0) ORDER BY FORMID, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.DISPLAYNAME , IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , USERID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), USERID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.USERID = A.CN AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.USERID = #searchID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) ORDER BY USERID, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.DISPLAYNAME , IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7), DEPTID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND A.CN = #searchID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) ORDER BY CN, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.FORMID, CASE WHEN #lang# = 1 THEN B.FORMNAME ELSE B.FORMNAME2 END AS FORMINFO FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG A JOIN TBL_FORMINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# $searchList$ GROUP BY A.FORMID, B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2 ORDER BY B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2

SELECT B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) AS DRAFTCNT, IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) AS DRAFTINGCNT, IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) AS DRAFTENDCNT, IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) AS RETURNCNT, IFNULL(DRAFTEND, 0) AS DRAFTEND, CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND( DTIME / DRAFTEND,2) ELSE 0 END AS DTIME FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT FORMID, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) AS DRAFTCNT, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) AS DRAFTINGCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(RETURNCNT) AS RETURNCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) AS DRAFTEND, SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) AS DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0) AND A.FORMID = #searchID# ORDER BY FORMID, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME , IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN , IFNULL(DRAFTEND, 0) DRAFTEND , CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTEND, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTEND , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY DEPTID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) AND B.DEPTID = #searchID# ORDER BY CN, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME , IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN , IFNULL(DRAFTEND, 0) DRAFTEND , CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND(DTIME / DRAFTEND, 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT USERID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTEND , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY USERID, TENANT_ID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.USERID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != '0' OR DRAFTINGCNT != '0' OR DRAFTENDCNT != '0' OR RETURNCNT != '0' ) AND B.USERID = #searchID# ORDER BY USERID, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7) REGDATE , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG B JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER A ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.DeptID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE < #endDate# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 0, 7)
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG ( REGDATE, DEPTID, DEPTNAME, USERID, USERNAME, DRAFTINGCNT, DRAFTENDCNT, DRAFTTIME, SUSININGCNT, SUSINENDCNT, SUSINTIME, RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #today# , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , CN , DISPLAYNAME , DINGCNT , DENDCNT , DENDTIME , SINGCNT , SENDCNT , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DESCRIPTION , DEPARTMENT , IFNULL(DINGCNT, 0) DINGCNT , IFNULL(SINGCNT, 0) SINGCNT , IFNULL(DENDCNT, 0) DENDCNT , IFNULL(SENDCNT, 0) SENDCNT , IFNULL(DENDTIME, 0) DENDTIME , IFNULL(SENDTIME, 0) SENDTIME , IFNULL(RETUNCNT, 0) RETUNCNT , TBA.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DESCRIPTION , DEPARTMENT , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER ) TBA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDA , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DINGCNT , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID ) TBB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.CN = TBB.WRITERIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDA , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SINGCNT , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID ) TBB2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.CN = TBB2.WRITERIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDB , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDB , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) DENDTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND ENDDATE >= #startDate# AND ENDDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID ) TBC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC.TENANT_ID AND
TBA.CN = TBC.WRITERIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDB , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDB , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) SENDTIME , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND ENDDATE >= #startDate# AND ENDDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID ) TBC2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.CN = TBC2.WRITERIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDC , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDC , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE FUNCTIONTYPE = '004' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID ) TBD ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBD.TENANT_ID AND TBA.CN = TBD.WRITERIDC ) AA )

INSERT INTO TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG ( REGDATE, FORMID, FORMNAME, FORMCONTID, FORMCONTNAME, DRAFTINGCNT, DRAFTENDCNT, DRAFTTIME, SUSININGCNT, SUSINENDCNT, SUSINTIME, RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #today# , FORMID , FORMNAME , FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , DINGCNT , DENDCNT , DENDTIME , SINGCNT , SENDCNT , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT , AA.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , FORMID , FORMNAME , IFNULL(DINGCNT, 0) DINGCNT , IFNULL(SINGCNT, 0) SINGCNT , IFNULL(DENDCNT, 0) DENDCNT , IFNULL(SENDCNT, 0) SENDCNT , IFNULL(RETUNCNT, 0) RETUNCNT , IFNULL(DENDTIME, 0) DENDTIME , IFNULL(SENDTIME, 0) SENDTIME , TBA.TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT A.FORMCONTID FORMCONTID , B.FORMCONTNAME FORMCONTNAME , FORMID , FORMNAME , A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_FORMINFO A JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = B.FORMCONTID ) TBA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DINGCNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID ) TBB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.FORMID = TBB.FORMIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SINGCNT , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID ) TBB2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.FORMID = TBB2.FORMIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDB , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) DENDTIME , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND ENDDATE >= #startDate# AND ENDDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID ) TBC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC.TENANT_ID AND TBA.FORMID = TBC.FORMIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDB , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SENDCNT , ROUND(AVG(ENDDATE - STARTDATE), 2) SENDTIME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND ENDDATE >= #startDate# AND ENDDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID ) TBC2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.FORMID = TBC2.FORMIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE FUNCTIONTYPE = '004' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID ) TBD ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBD.TENANT_ID AND TBA.FORMID = TBD.FORMIDA ) AA )
